headline: Is MSCI (MSCI) Fully Valued On Higher Expense Guidance After Earnings?
summary: MSCI (MSCI) posted second quarter revenue of US$867 million and net income of US$342 million, with adjusted earnings per share slightly below consensus and a higher full year expense outlook tied to the First Street acquisition. See our latest analysis for MSCI. MSCI’s latest earnings update and higher expense outlook arrived after a period where momentum has cooled, with the share price at US$570.95 and a 90 day share price return decline of 4.52%, while the 1 year total shareholder return...

headline: Is MSCI's (MSCI) AI Push Changing the Tradeoff Between Growth Investment and Capital Returns?
summary: MSCI Inc. has already reported its second‑quarter 2026 results, with revenue rising to US$867 million and net income to US$342 million, while also affirming a quarterly dividend of US$2.05 per share and continuing share repurchases under its existing buyback program. Alongside these figures, MSCI agreed a partnership with UBS Group AG to enhance transparency in private markets via an AI‑powered platform, at the same time an academic study raised questions about how its ESG ratings balance...
